author: Matthew Rockwell
name: Looped Transformer + Per-Layer LoRA + Int6 + Sliding Window
blurb: 5 unique transformer blocks looped to 30 virtual layers with per-virtual-layer LoRA adapters on Q,V projections. Int6 quantization with fp16 embedding passthrough and sliding window evaluation. 1xH100 non-record run; pending 8xH100 validation.
val_bpb_note: Estimated with int6+sliding window. Prior int4 run: 1.50 pre-quant, 1.60 post-quant on 1xH100 (203M tokens). 8xH100 projection: ~1.20 bpb.
bytes_total_note: Estimated. Prior int4 artifact: 8,880,000 bytes. Int6 will be larger but under 16MB.
